Title: High model inference latency on CPU rephrasing
Description: The model rephrasing API (/rephrase) takes between 25s to 49s to complete a single generation request on CPU.
Steps to Reproduce: Submit a question in Question Studio and click 'Generate Alternative' under Medium or Hard options.
Resolution/Status: Recommended: Implement task queues (Celery/Redis) with server-sent events (SSE) or WebSockets, and cache frequent rephrase patterns.

Title: Table pagination limit hidden from view
Description: The bulk processing table defaults to 10 items per page without pagination buttons being highly visible, leading users to believe some rows were lost.
Steps to Reproduce: Upload a batch of 15 questions, process it, and count the rows in the results table.
Resolution/Status: Recommended: Improve pagination visibility, add 'Page X of Y' labels next to the page controls.

Title: Console Warnings on Font Face load fail
Description: Subtle warning logged to browser console regarding specific local font family override fallback.
Steps to Reproduce: Inspect browser developer console during page load.
Resolution/Status: Recommended: Standardize web-safe fallbacks or package local font assets inside static folder.
